evidence.claim: Only read-only DevHub review and public-source lookup scenarios are released to consumers.
Draft-preview work must remain reversible and must stop before official attach, certification, submission, scheduling, cancellation, or payment.
Validation used committed fixtures and did not contact live LLM services or DevHub.
Validation did not mutate prompts, guardrails, or agent state.

no_live_llm.statement: The release handoff is produced from fixtures without live LLM calls.

no_devhub_access.statement: The release handoff is produced without live DevHub access.

no_prompt_mutation.statement: The release handoff does not mutate prompts.

no_guardrail_mutation.statement: The release handoff does not mutate guardrails.

no_agent_state_mutation.statement: The release handoff does not mutate agent state.

evidence.claim: Consumer copy must say the agent can summarize cited PP&D requirements, compare known facts to process requirements, and draft reversible previews only.

Supported safe scenarios are public-source explanation, account-scoped status review after user login, fee notice review, correction request review, attachment list review, and inspection-result review.
The consumer handoff must block official submission, certification, upload, purchase, inspection scheduling, cancellation, extension or reactivation request, payment-detail entry, and final payment.
Consequential official actions require attended user handoff and action-specific confirmation outside the released autonomous consumer capability.

capability_limits.statement: The agent may explain cited PP&D public guidance and identify missing, stale, ambiguous, or conflicting user facts, but it must not represent its output as an official City decision.
The release is validated from committed fixtures and does not depend on live crawl results, live DevHub state, private account data, or live LLM responses.
The agent must stop before any official submission, certification, upload, scheduling, cancellation, extension, reactivation, purchase, or payment step.

safe_read_only_scenarios.statement: Review public PP&D guidance, forms, permit-process notes, fee notices, and file-preparation rules using cited source evidence.
After the user completes any login manually, review account-scoped permit status, correction requests, fee notices, attachment lists, and inspection results without changing the official record.

reversible_draft_preview_boundaries.statement: Prepare local draft field mappings, document checklists, and PDF/form preview values only when the user can inspect and discard them before use.
Draft assistance may stage reversible values or save a draft only when the workflow has not reached certification, official attachment, submission, scheduling, cancellation, purchase, or payment.

blocked_consequential_actions.message: I cannot submit a permit request. Please review the prepared draft and complete the official submission yourself while present in DevHub.
I cannot certify or acknowledge statements for you. Please read the acknowledgement and make any certification yourself.
I cannot upload corrections to the official record. I can help preview the package, then you must perform the upload while present.
I cannot purchase a trade permit. I can help review eligibility and draft inputs before you complete any purchase yourself.
I cannot schedule an inspection. I can help review available context, then you must choose and confirm any inspection scheduling action.
I cannot cancel or withdraw a permit, request, or inspection. Please make any cancellation or withdrawal decision and action yourself.
I cannot request an extension or reactivation. I can help summarize the visible requirements, then you must submit any request yourself.
blocked_consequential_actions.required_handoff: attended user extension or reactivation request

blocked_consequential_actions.message: I cannot enter payment details. Please enter any card, bank, or payment information yourself in the official payment flow.
I cannot submit a payment. Please review the amount, payer details, and official payment page yourself before submitting payment.

evidence.claim: The final smoke packet confirmed that consumer-facing copy includes capability limits, safe read-only scenarios, reversible draft-preview boundaries, blocked-action messages, and owner fields.
The final smoke packet confirmed the handoff path has no live service calls and no mutation side effects.

no_live_llm.statement: Final smoke did not invoke a live LLM.

no_devhub_access.statement: Final smoke did not access live DevHub.

no_prompt_mutation.statement: Final smoke did not mutate prompts.

no_guardrail_mutation.statement: Final smoke did not mutate guardrails.

no_agent_state_mutation.statement: Final smoke did not mutate agent state.
